---
title: "Functions, packages, and the tidyverse"
subtitle: "Wednesday, May 20, 2026"
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: true
    smaller: true
    output-file: "day3-functions-packages-slides.html"
  html:
    toc: true
    output-file: "day3-functions-packages-page.html"
  pdf:
    output-file: "day3-functions-packages.pdf"
editor: source
---

::: {.callout-note style="font-size: 1.3em;"}
## [Today: Wednesday May 20]{style="font-size: 1.3em;"}

**Before class**

- **Perusall Assignment**: *Data Computing* §3.1–3.5 ([Click here](https://psu.instructure.com/courses/2487468/assignments/18307709)).
- **HW 0: Setup confirmation** ([Click here](https://psu.instructure.com/courses/2487468/assignments/18308171)).

**Plan for today**

- 

**Helpful links**

- [Syllabus](../../syllabus/syllabus.qmd) · [AI policy](../../syllabus/academic-integrity-and-ai-policy.qmd) · [Schedule](../../schedule.qmd) · [*Data Computing* §3](https://dtkaplan.github.io/DataComputingEbook/chap-basic-r-commands.html#chap:basic-r-commands)
:::

## Wrap-up & looking ahead

**Tomorrow:** Quarto basics, writing reproducible documents.

**Due Thursday May 21 (tomorrow) before class:**

- Read *Data Computing* §4.1–4.7 on Perusall ([Click here](https://psu.instructure.com/courses/2487468/assignments/18307710)).

**Due 11:59 p.m. Friday May 22:**

- HW 1: Basic R, simple plots ([Click here]()).

**Quiz 1 in class on Friday May 22**

**Reference links:**

- [Syllabus](../../syllabus/syllabus.qmd) · [AI policy](../../syllabus/academic-integrity-and-ai-policy.qmd) · [Schedule](../../schedule.qmd) · [*Data Computing*](https://dtkaplan.github.io/DataComputingEbook/)
